what_it_does: Serves as the top-level documentation and usage guide for the ConceptV design system, cataloguing brand voice, visual tokens, shape and icon conventions, asset sources, and UI kit structure.
observations: Design system for ConceptV, an Australian innovation-technology company whose products are built on a proprietary Universal Mechanics model.
Defines four canonical entity shapes: Circle (User Portal), Hexagon (Property Wizard), Octagon (Virtual Hubs), Diamond line-fill (Vi).
Specifies a warm-paper-with-gold-ink palette sampled from the logo: gold #E0C010, bronze #988058, ink #1F1A12, canvas #FBF7EC, sunken #E8E2CC.
Voice rules: sentence case everywhere, direct second person, imperative actions, compact helper copy under inputs, no exclamation marks or emoji in body copy.
Signature copy pattern is inline previews of consequences, e.g. a URL preview with variables rendered in gold.
Three icon families: sidebar colour emoji, a 99-glyph CV line-icon library, and gold-circle entity-badge variants of the same icons.
UI kits are split into platform dashboard, virtual-hub viewer, and Vi AI workspace.
8 px base grid, ~280 px fixed sidebar, soft-gold panel sections, 12 px card radius, 1.5 px rounded-cap line illustrations.
Includes a manifest of the root folder and a sources/assets table with local paths.
Notes that conceptv.com.au was offline during exploration and that the real product font is unknown.
standouts: Canonical shape system tightly mapped to product entities.
Warm-paper-with-gold-ink visual identity with precise sampled colour values.
Dedicated 99-icon bronze-line library plus React component and searchable explorer.
Inline consequence preview as a brand signature copy pattern.
conventions: Sentence case for all labels and titles.
Direct second-person voice and imperative verbs for actions.
Flat ivory backgrounds with no gradients, patterns, or textures.
1.5 px stroke, rounded caps, no-fill line icons and illustrations.
8 px grid, 12 px card radius, soft shadows, dashed gold active borders.
File-local cross-references to assets using relative paths.
concerns: Real product font is unknown and substitution is flagged.
System was calibrated while the live website was offline, so it relies only on mockups and provided assets.
Claims of pixel-accurate colour sampling cannot be verified from this file alone.
notes: This is the design-system README and brand rulebook for ConceptV, governing voice, colour, shape, iconography, and UI kit boundaries rather than implementing code.
questions: What is the exact product font and where are the webfont files?
How do the colour tokens in colors_and_type.css map to the sampled values listed here?
What is the intended routing or integration between the three UI kits and the actual application?
Are the shape system and icon library already implemented in product code, or only documented here?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to document the ConceptV design system; the file does exactly that, while also acting as an asset index and source-of-truth reference.
apparent_themes: Warm, restrained luxury through gold and bronze on ivory.
Consistency via canonical shapes and a single icon library.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to create a self-contained, authoritative brand and design-system handbook that designers and developers can use to produce consistent ConceptV surfaces without relying on the live website.
novelty: The tight coupling of product entities to canonical geometric shapes and the dedicated 99-icon bronze-line library with gold-circle entity-badge wrapping are distinctive.
contribution: Provides a comprehensive brand-voice, visual-token, shape, and iconography specification plus an asset map and UI-kit boundaries that a fused system would keep as the design-system reference.
summary_for_embedding: README documentation for the ConceptV design system specifying brand voice, warm-paper-with-gold-ink visual tokens, canonical entity shapes, a 99-icon line library, and UI kit structure.
intention_for_embedding: To serve as the authoritative, self-contained design-system handbook and asset index for ConceptV product surfaces.
